text.title: Activation Framework Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL `Applies If` items evaluate true AND no `Skip If` item evaluates true?

conclusion.verdict: return action=skip with reason; yield to parent workflow

branch.question: Is the artefact owner named with a review_deadline <= 90 days?

conclusion.verdict: refuse to synthesise until owner + review_deadline supplied

branch.question: Does the synthesised artefact validate against 02-output-contract.xml?

conclusion.verdict: iterate up to 3 times; on 3rd failure escalate to human

branch.question: Has the named human reviewer signed off?

conclusion.verdict: log any deviations in deviation_log_reference; release artefact

text.example: preconditions_hold=true -> owner_named=true -> schema_valid=true -> signoff=true -> conclusion ref=deviation-log (release)
